features: LASTING PROTECTION: This anti-perspirant for men provides up to 72 hours of reliable protection from sweat patches and body odour, creating a lasting clean feeling
INVIGORATING: The anti-perspirant deodorant uses a Cool-Care formula, delivering a refreshing boost of coolness to the underarm and rejuvenating the skin
BANISH BODY ODOUR: The men's deodorant uses the latest in skincare technology to eradicate body odour, preventing unpleasant smells from forming all day long
HOW TO USE: Shake the men's deodorant spray well before use. Hold the can 15 cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before dressing
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: The men's aerosol spray has been dermatologically tested and proven to be kind to the skin, protecting and supporting its natural barriers
description: Product Description NIVEA Men Cool Kick Mini Spray Anti-Perspirant (250ml) ‚Äî Cooling and invigorating deodorant spray Give your skin a boost with this refreshing anti-perspirant deodorant for men. The formula is kind to the skin, utilising innovative Cool-Care technology to deliver a boost of cooling freshness. The spray is designed to provide long-lasting protection, preventing body odour and sweat from accumulating for up to 72 hours at a time. Present in over 160 countries, NIVEA is one of the world's largest and most trusted skincare brands with more than 140 years of experience. As a market leader in the global skincare industry, our researchers work extensively to provide high-quality, dermatologically approved products to suit various skin types and needs.‚Äã How to use: Shake the men's deodorant spray well before use. Hold the can 15 cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before dressing Product Benefits: 72H protection from odour and sweat Nourishes the skin Dermatologically tested 0% alcohol content 250ml Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isopropyl Palmitate, Persea Gratissima Oil, Octyldodecanol, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Dimethicone, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, Coumarin, Geraniol, Parfum Directions Shake well before use, hold 15cm from underarm and spray. Allow to dry before dressing. Safety Warning Pressurised container: protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 degree c. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Do not spray on a naked flame or any incandescent material. Do not spray in the eyes. Keep away from sources of ignition - no smoking. Keep out of the reach of children. Avoid direct inhalation. Use only as directed. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin. Solvent abuse can kill instantly. Box Contains 1 x Nivea For Men Cool Kick Anti Perspirant Deodorant 250 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd., Birmingham, B37 7YS. See more
